servinfo.title: Clutch Fluid Pipe and Hose Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Clutch Fluid Pipe and Hose Components

attention2.ptxt: Do not allow fluid to get on painted surface. It may cause painted surface damage.

s1.ptxt: Remove dust and dirt from each joint of pipe to be disconnected and clean around brake master cylinder reservoir cap.
Remove fluid from brake master cylinder reservoir with syringe or such.
Pull out clip (1) at clutch master cylinder (3) and pull out clip (5) at fluid pipe joint (4), to disconnect clutch fluid pipe (2) and hose (6).
Pull out clamps of clutch fluid pipe, to disconnect clutch fluid pipe.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Do not allow fluid to get on painted surface.
Do not allow pipe to contact hard against vehicle body or other parts.
After installation, check clutch pedal free travel.
After installation, bleed air from clutch system.
Add fluid to “MAX” level of reservoir.
